title: Alakazam the Great
director: Daisaku Shirakawa, Taiji Yabushita, Osamu Tezuka
writer: Goro Kontaibo, Hideyuki Takahashi, Osamu Tezuka
actors: Kiyoshi Komiyama, Noriko Shindô, Hideo Kinoshita
plot: An arrogant monkey is forced to go on a journey where he learns about gluttony, greed, love and humility.
